overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a blue-skinned Na'vi character exploring an indoor settlement with industrial metal structures and tribal fabric elements. The character walks through storage areas, communal living spaces with orange fabric canopies, a workshop area, and ascends a large metal staircase.

events.description: exits storage room into communal area with fabric canopies overhead

agents.ego_description: walking through a storage room with metal shelves and industrial equipment, passing a child sweeping the floor

notable_agents.action: child sweeping the floor with a broom

entered.detail: tall metal shelving with boxes and supplies
tall vending machine with glowing blue interface
orange fabric draped across the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a narrow storage room with metal shelving units and a vending machine. The Na'vi character walks forward, passing a child sweeping the floor, and transitions into a wider communal space with fabric canopies overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: communal living area with fabric hammocks

events.description: lighting shifts to warmer orange tones under the fabric canopies

agents.ego_description: walking under draped fabric canopies through a communal space with hammocks and floor cushions

entered.detail: white fabric hammocks suspended between wooden beams
orange fabric draped overhead creating a tent-like ceiling
scattered cushions and rugs on the floor
thick wooden beams supporting the fabric ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a semi-covered communal living area with orange fabric canopies overhead and hammocks suspended between wooden pillars. The lighting shifts to warmer tones as the character walks over colorful patterned floor grating.

events.description: enters workshop area with mesh wall displaying hanging tools
turns around to exit the workshop area

agents.ego_description: examining the workshop wall with hanging tools and equipment, then turning to leave

notable_agents.action: human sitting at workbench working on equipment

entered.detail: metal mesh wall with various tools and equipment hanging
wooden workbench with items on top
yellow plastic storage containers stacked on floor

segments.scene_description: The character turns into a workshop area featuring a mesh wall with hanging tools and a workbench. A human NPC sits working at a table. The character examines the area briefly before turning to exit back toward the main communal space.

events.description: begins ascending the large metal staircase

agents.ego_description: walking toward and climbing a large metal staircase to reach an upper level

notable_agents.action: Na'vi character sitting on a stool near the staircase

entered.detail: large industrial metal staircase with railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character moves through the main hall toward a large metal staircase, passing a seated Na'vi NPC and blue glowing lights. The character then begins ascending the industrial staircase with metal railings to reach an upper platform.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a functional industrial settlement that transitions from cramped storage quarters into an expansive, multi-level communal hub. It begins in a narrow storage room filled with metal shelving and a vending machine, moving past a child sweeping the floor before opening into a wider living area. As the character progresses, the environment shifts to a semi-covered space defined by orange fabric canopies, suspended hammocks, and warm lighting reflecting off colorful patterned floor grating. The camera then veers into a detailed workshop area featuring a mesh wall of tools and a working human NPC, before turning back toward the main hall. Finally, the scene moves past blue glowing lights and a seated Na'vi inhabitant, ascending a large industrial metal staircase toward an upper platform.
